requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Local Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与当地安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與當地安裝審查

summary.en: Bosnia and Herzegovina BESS projects may require local fire-authority, municipality, insurer, and project-owner review in addition to CE-aligned product evidence. BAS and the official project framework are used for technical references, while practical acceptance is often tied to local fire and installation conditions rather than a single national whole-unit BESS fire certificate.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那BESS项目除CE对齐的产品文件外，可能还需接受当地消防主管、地方消防、保险方和项目业主审查。技术参考通常使用BAS及相关项目框架，但实际验收往往依托当地消防与安装条件，而不是单一国家级整机BESS消防证书。
summary.zht: 波斯尼亞和黑塞哥維那BESS專案除CE對齊的產品文件外，可能還需接受當地消防主管、地方消防、保險方和專案業主審查。技術參考通常使用BAS及相關專案框架，但實際驗收往往依託當地消防與安裝條件，而不是單一國家級整機BESS消防證書。

standards_or_laws: Bosnia and Herzegovina public installation safety expectations for electrical energy systems
BAS references for CE-oriented product and electrical documentation
Local fire-authority and municipality installation review process

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 for energy-storage lithium and system safety references, including fire and thermal-risk review. These reports can support a Bosnia-facing dossier but do not replace country-side fire and installation approval obligations.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558作为储能锂电和系统安全参考，并包含消防与热风险审查。该类报告可支持波斯尼亚面向市场的材料包，但不能替代当地消防和安装批准义务。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558作為儲能鋰電和系統安全參考，並包含消防與熱風險審查。該類報告可支援波斯尼亞面向市場的資料包，但不能取代當地消防和安裝批准義務。

gap.en: Do not assume a Chinese domestic fire report is sufficient. Prepare a Bosnia-specific fire dossier: enclosure design, cell chemistry, thermal-runaway mitigation, detection and suppression concept, ventilation or gas analysis, spacing, access routes, emergency shutoff, commissioning tests, and Turkish-language is not required, but Bosnia-relevant operator language must be aligned with site documents.
gap.zh: 不要假设中国国内消防报告已充分对应波斯尼亚。应准备面向波斯尼亚的消防资料包：柜体结构、所用电芯体系、热失控缓解、检测与灭火方案、通风或气体分析、间距与通道、紧急停机、投运测试，以及与场站文件一致的当地语言说明。
gap.zht: 不要假設中國國內消防報告已充分對應波斯尼亞。應準備面向波斯尼亞的消防資料包：櫃體設計、所用電芯體系、熱失控緩解、探測與滅火方案、通風或氣體分析、間距與通道、緊急停機、投運測試，以及與場站資料一致的當地語言說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the Bosnia and Herzegovina local fire authority, municipality, insurer, or project owner requires site-level fire evidence; no national blanket certificate is stated as a legal substitute here
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese product approval and destination-site requirements

source.publisher: Government of Bosnia and Herzegovina and local civil-protection/fire authorities

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product safety evidence does not replace Bosnia local fire and installation review. Treat fire design and commissioning conditions as project-specific approval items.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品安全证据不能替代波斯尼亚当地消防和安装审查。应将消防设计与调试条件作为项目特定批准事项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品安全證據不能取代波斯尼亞當地消防和安裝審查。應將消防設計與調試條件作為專案特定批准事項處理。
